Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Ragnarus the Crimson Vault]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 10''' — Ragnarus the Crimson Vault is a Territory exclusive to the Kings of Damasca.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 13''' — Leah's orders from the capital were passed through her Territory of Ragnarus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 13''' — The sacrifice is a function of Ragnarus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 14''' — Ragnarus is also known as the Crimson Vault.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — The Hanging Tree was once a tree from Ragnarus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 5''' — Ragnarus is one of the original nine Territories.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 6''' — Ragnarus is the ninth Territory whose only Travelers are Damascan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 13''' — Ragnarus promotes sacrifice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — Ragnarus contains powerful weapons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — Ragnarus has silver doors marked with the visage of a bearded, one-eyed king.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — The bloodline of Ragnarus must continue and remain in power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — Leah Traveled to Ragnarus on the day of her appointment.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — Ragnarus witnessed Leah's oath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 16''' — Ragnarus is a Territory that has a direct route into the royal palace of Cana.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — Kai and Indirial sought the aid of Ragnarus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — Leah's crown materializes from Ragnarus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — Ragnarus is a location containing swords.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — Ragnarus is the name of the sword that bit Master Kai.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — Alin was on the verge of stepping into Ragnarus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Ragnarus is a location where artifacts come with a price.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Ragnarus has a ruby light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Ragnarus is one of the four Incarnations identified by Indirial.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Grandmaster Lirial believes something is from Ragnarus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — Ragnarus has a sticky, grasping presence like a disembodied heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 25''' — Ragnarus is a place with torches.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 1''' — Ragnarus possesses a poison that leaves marks on bodies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — Ragnarus can harvest power to fuel its armory of thirsty weapons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — Ragnarus reigns over all other Territories.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — Leah is the last remaining child of Ragnarus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Ragnarus has an antechamber with a carved wooden throne.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 12''' — Ragnarus and Elysia once fought.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — Kai's blade is a red-and-black sword that Lycus believes comes from Ragnarus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 15''' — Ragnarus makes matters more direct.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 16''' — Ragnarus is an entity that crippled Kai.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 18''' — Ragnarus is a power or entity that Leah can summon using her crown.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 18''' — Ragnarus is a Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 19''' — Ragnarus is a Territory of overt violence and instant gratification.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 19''' — The mask Simon wears was originally an artifact of Ragnarus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — Ragnarus has many tools that can be used as weapons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — Ragnarus is a different Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — Ragnarus may prevent Denner from banishing and re-summoning his Dragon's Fang.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — A red, pulsing metal heart was pulled from the Tartarus Incarnation, which Kai identified as Ragnarus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — Ragnarus is the entity of which Zakareth is the Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 24''' — Ragnarus is a place with glittering weapons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — Ragnarus is an Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — Ragnarus is described as being straightforward.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Simon went blade-to-blade with Ragnarus.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
